name: Alice Hu
bio: Xiaoli 'Alice' Hu is a small business owner who previously ran for District 12 in 2022. She is running again in the 2026 open-seat race, but is listed in the Republican column by Illinois Sunshine. Her previous 2022 campaign committee is now 'Final' (closed) status with zero funds.
prior_office: Small business owner. Candidate for Cook County Commissioner District 12 (2022).

jacket.note: ILSBE committee #38764. Top-25 donors scraped via Firecrawl 2026-03-14.

red_flags.label: No campaign funds reported
red_flags.detail: Hu has raised $0 in 2026. Her 2022 campaign committee is closed with no balance. She appears in Republican column on Illinois Sunshine, not Democratic primary.

red_flags.label: Likely inactive candidate
red_flags.detail: 2022 committee status is 'Final' (closed). No new 2026 committee filing found. Illinois Sunshine shows $0.00 raised.
